root.sql: SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.membership_no ) as memname, sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.membership_no, sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.recrieve_docno -- sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.recrieve_date FROM sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control WHERE sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.recrieve_status = '1' -- and sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.recrieve_date > to_date('11/09/2017','dd/mm/yyyy') /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY -- sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.recrieve_date, sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.membership_no, sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.recrieve_docno
